title: Unit 01 and Kaworu Nagisa and why Unit 01 is so important
display_title: Unit 01 and Kaworu Nagisa and why Unit 01 is so important
wikitext:
[]: Unit-01 and Kaworu Nagisa, and why Unit-01 is so important             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jun 30, 2007 10:59 pm (Apologies to everyone if this has been discussed and concluded previously. I'm new, and I've had very little time to go through a mountain of discussion posts ) Rei is a vessel for Lilith's soul, and Kaworu a vessel for Adam's soul. The latter is why Kaworu is able to control Eva-02 even when not inside: it's essentially a part of his own body. Of course, Gendo knew all along what Rei really was, and he knew that SEELE had plenty of power and resources of their own, and they wouldn't leave everything to NERV and him. They were able to go with the MP Eva and S2 engine projects pretty fast. In the circumstances, couldn't Gendo have anticipated SEELE coming up with an Angel counterpart to Rei? From Kaworu's birthday, SEELE beat NERV to the creation of a human vessel for an Angel soul. Gendo is no fool: and he might have known something about Kaworu all the same, and taken precautions against such this sort of intrusion. He certainly didn't seem to share Fuyuzuki's grim surprise ("God have mercy, SEELE has sent an angel to us") when his newest pilot turned out to be the 17th angel. Unit-01 comes into the picture. Sho's seen being seemingly 'born' from Lilith, but with a noticeable black rectangle around her core. I think the core comes from Adam, which is why Shogoki is shaped like any other Adam-based Eva, but her biomass comes from Lilith(And hence she's got the genetic material of both angels, put together). The naturally grown Lilith material is superior to the artificially cultured Adam material, and that is why Shogoki is the most powerful and most 'angelic' Eva. It also means that Unit-01 is not part of Adam's body, and not directly controllable by Kaworu. Combine- 1. Lilith-based material(Can't be controlled by SEELE's counterpart to Rei). 2. A dominant soul, Gendo's wife no less.(Kaworu states that he can control an Eva as long as there is no dominant soul, and Yui dumped both Rei and the dummy plug in Ep 19, not to mention all the berserking. Kaworu would never be able to hijack Shogoki) You get an Eva that's totally impossible to control by SEELE using Kaworu, one with aspects of both Angels, making it closest to God, and on Gendo's side of instrumentality(More or less). Of course, that doesn't explain why Lorenz also banks on Shogoki to do as it should, but this is just my two cents...

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jul 02, 2007 10:07 pm You're covering a lot of stuff that's going in a lot of different threads (Unit-01 & Lilith, 24' Plothole, etc.). But while what you say is fine and all, I still haven't found a decent explanation as to what Seele's reasons for sending Kaworu to Nerv could've been. After the Lance was gone they knew Lilith was useless to them. They knew they would have to have Sho to execute 3I. And while I'm not ruling out the possibility that Kaworu could synch with Sho, if we're assuming he couldn't, what could he have possibly done at Nerv to help Seele? Since I've yet to think of any possible explanation, right now I've settled with they just wanted Kaworu out of the way. Since only an Eva could destroy Kaworu, they essentially sent Kaworu to Nerv specifically so Shinji would squash him. It's likely they lied to him, telling him that they were going to let him destroy Lilim and have the Earth, all the while knowing (hoping?) he would be stopped long before he got the chance.

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Mon Jul 02, 2007 10:28 pm Suicide mission? Figures...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 02, 2007 11:37 pm @Jimbo: Is there ANYthing about the Kaworu matter that isn't covered here? ;) http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2095

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Jul 03, 2007 12:40 am Reichu wrote: @Jimbo: Is there ANYthing about the Kaworu matter that isn't covered here? ;) http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2095
